scope: All production Oura API v2 usercollection GET list/detail endpoints are covered as streams. Sandbox usercollection endpoints are documented duplicates. Webhook subscription endpoints are excluded because they require separate app-level client credentials and carry subscription-management side effects.

excluded.reason: Sandbox usercollection endpoint duplicates the production Oura usercollection API for synthetic data; use base_url override with the same streams when sandbox reads are needed.
